# Readiness Gates

Each gate includes required inputs, allowed soft gaps, hard blockers, packet outputs, and unlocked downstream stage.

- requirements_ready
- discovery_ready
- design_ready
- issue_ready
- implementation_ready
- review_ready
- test_ready
- verification_ready
- docs_ready
- security_ready
- ci_ready
- release_ready
- deployment_ready
- observability_ready
- incident_ready
- maintenance_ready
- retrospective_ready
- decommission_ready

Use `continuity_packet.readiness` to record current and next stage status and missing inputs.
